name: Damp Battlegrounds
description: A flooded industrial zone that smells of rust, regret, and someone else's energy drink. Ankle-deep water everywhere. Optimal for ambushes, sub-optimal for dry socks.

name: Buried City (Now 30% more buried)
description: An ancient city partially submerged in sand and rubble. The remnants of buildings poke out like tombstones, and the air is thick with the scent of history and decay.

name: The Breach
description: A massive tear in the landscape caused by something ARC refuses to comment on. The silence is louder than the robots.

name: ARC Ruins
description: Crumbling ARC facilities filled with malfunctioning tech, broken dreams, and questionable safety protocols.

name: Sunken Highrise
description: A high-rise building partially submerged in water and mud. Great loot, terrible footing.

name: Forgotten Fields
description: Wide-open farmland reclaimed by nature and robots. Wheat, weeds, and wandering death machines.

name: Stella Camping Festival
description: You'll get camped. You get eighth-partied. Felicia will crash out. It's just Stella.
